properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v1 v4 v3 v5 v4 v6 v3 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Thanks be to God, who always causes us to triumph in His name. Thanks be to God, who always causes us to win. (Yeah!) Thanks be to God, who always causes us to triumph in His name. Thanks be to God! Thanks be to God!

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: We have overcome. Hallelujah! Hallelujah! We have overcome. By the power of Your name. Jesus, You're the One. Hallelujah! Hallelujah! The One who made a way for us. To triumph in His name.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Oh whoa! Oh whoa! Oh whoa! Oh whoa!

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: We have overcome. Hallelujah! Hallelujah! We have overcome. By the power of Your name. Jesus You're the One. Hallelujah! Hallelujah! The One who made a way for us. Who made a way for us.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: We've got the victory! Everything would be alright, alright! We've got the victory! Everything would be alright. Cause we're on the winning side. We're on the winning side!

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: The One who made a way for us. To triumph in Your name.
